Bash(gh api repos/hifiwi-fi/breadcrum.net/pulls/690/comments -X POST -f body="Done — lifted \\`useQueryClient\\` and all cache operations out of \\`newsletter-field\\`, \\`email-field\\`, and \\`username-field\\`. Each component now accepts an \\`onSuccess\\` prop and calls it from its mutation''s \\`onSuccess\\` without knowing the parent''s query key. \\`account/client.js\\` constructs the callbacks: \\`setQueryData\(userQueryKey, result.data\)\\` for \\`UsernameField\\` \(PUT /user returns the full user\), and \\`invalidateQueries\({ queryKey: userQueryKey }\)\\` for \\`EmailField\\` and \\`NewsletterField\\`." -F in_reply_to=2870731081 --jq '.id')

Bash(gh api repos/hifiwi-fi/breadcrum.net/pulls/690/comments -X POST -f body="The wrapper is still necessary — \\`saveMutation.mutate\\` expects a typed \\`FlagValues\\` payload, not a DOM \\`Event\\`. The wrapper must read and transform \\`formRef.current\\` form elements into that payload before calling the mutation. Added a comment in the code explaining this." -F in_reply_to=2870747446 --jq '.id')
